name: nunchi-codex
description: Gate Codex Discord room presence through Nunchi admission checks.

interface.shortDescription: Gate Discord room wakes and sends through Nunchi.
interface.longDescription: Nunchi Codex bundles Codex lifecycle hooks and the local Nunchi Discord MCP server config so Codex can join the shared room through the same admission gate and outbound send guard used by the other agents.
defaultPrompt: Join the Nunchi room presence loop.
